glosses.ja: 合意する; 予約を取る

translations.en: I would like to arrange an appointment.
translations.ru: Я хотел бы записаться на приём.
translations.nl: Ik wil graag een afspraak maken.
translations.sv: Jag skulle vilja boka en tid.
translations.ro: Aș dori să fac o programare.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; grammatical subject.
Modal auxiliary in Konjunktiv II (polite desire); finite verb agreeing with 'Ich'; selects the infinitive 'vereinbaren'.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Termin' marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; functions as direct object (accusative).
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; non-separable verb meaning 'to arrange/agree on'.

sentences.target: Wir können morgen einen Arzttermin vereinbaren.

translations.de: Wir können morgen einen Arzttermin vereinbaren.
translations.en: We can arrange a doctor’s appointment tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana podemos pedir cita con el médico.
translations.fr: On peut prendre rendez-vous chez le médecin demain.
translations.it: Domani possiamo fissare una visita dal medico.
translations.ko: 우리 내일 병원 진료 예약할 수 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天可以预约看医生。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日可以預約睇醫生。
translations.ru: Мы можем завтра записаться к врачу.
translations.he: אנחנו יכולים לקבוע תור לרופא מחר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai mình có thể đặt lịch khám bác sĩ.
translations.ar: يمكننا حجز موعد عند الطبيب غدًا.
translations.nl: We kunnen morgen een afspraak bij de dokter maken.
translations.uk: Ми можемо завтра записатися до лікаря.
translations.hu: Holnap tudunk időpontot kérni az orvosnál.
translations.hi: हम कल डॉक्टर के पास अपॉइंटमेंट ले सकते हैं.
translations.pl: Możemy jutro umówić wizytę u lekarza.
translations.el: Μπορούμε να κλείσουμε ραντεβού με τον γιατρό αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi kan bestille time hos legen i morgen.
translations.id: Besok kita bisa membuat janji dengan dokter.
translations.sv: Vi kan boka tid hos läkaren i morgon.
translations.ro: Mâine putem face o programare la medic.
translations.cs: Zítra si můžeme domluvit termín u lékaře.
translations.da: Vi kan bestille en tid hos lægen i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、診察の予約ができるよ。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; grammatical subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite (1st person plural present); indicates ability; selects the infinitive 'vereinbaren'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; sets the time frame.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Arzttermin' marking the direct object.
Compound common noun (Arzt + Termin), masculine; functions as direct object (accusative).
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; non-separable.

sentences.target: Du kannst mit der Lehrerin einen Termin vereinbaren.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈleːʁəʁɪn ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn fɛʁˈaɪ̯nbaːʁən/

translations.de: Du kannst mit der Lehrerin einen Termin vereinbaren.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst mɪt deːɐ̯ ˈleːʁəʁɪn ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn fɛʁˈaɪ̯nbaːʁən/
translations.en: You can arrange an appointment with the teacher.
translations.es: Puedes pedir una cita con la profesora.
translations.fr: Tu peux prendre rendez-vous avec la prof.
translations.it: Puoi fissare un appuntamento con l'insegnante.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以和老师约个时间。
translations.yue: 你可以同老師約個時間。
translations.ru: Ты можешь договориться о встрече с учительницей.
translations.pt: Você pode marcar um horário com a professora.
translations.he: אתה יכול לקבוע פגישה עם המורה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể hẹn gặp cô giáo.
translations.nl: Je kunt een afspraak maken met de lerares.
translations.uk: Ти можеш домовитися про зустріч з учителькою.
translations.hu: Meg tudsz beszélni egy időpontot a tanárnővel.
translations.hi: तुम शिक्षिका से मिलने का समय तय कर सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz umówić się na spotkanie z nauczycielką.
translations.el: Μπορείς να κλείσεις ραντεβού με τη δασκάλα.
translations.nb: Du kan avtale en time med læreren.
translations.id: Kamu bisa membuat janji dengan guru.
translations.sv: Du kan boka en tid med läraren.
translations.ro: Poți stabili o întâlnire cu profesoara.
translations.cs: Můžeš si domluvit schůzku s učitelkou.
translations.da: Du kan aftale en tid med læreren.
translations.ja: 先生と面談の予約ができるよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; grammatical subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite (2nd person singular present); indicates ability; selects the infinitive 'vereinbaren'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating accompaniment.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Lehrerin' required by 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'mit' in dative; denotes the person with whom.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Termin' marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine; direct object (accusative) of 'vereinbaren'.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal; non-separable.

sentences.target: Mein Chef will ein kurzes Treffen vereinbaren.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ʃɛf vɪl aɪ̯n ˈkʊʁt͡səs ˈtʁɛfn̩ fɛʁˈaɪ̯nbaːʁən/

translations.de: Mein Chef will ein kurzes Treffen vereinbaren.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ʃɛf vɪl aɪ̯n ˈkʊʁt͡səs ˈtʁɛfn̩ fɛʁˈaɪ̯nbaːʁən/
translations.en: My boss wants to arrange a quick meeting.
translations.es: Mi jefe quiere organizar una reunión breve.
translations.fr: Mon patron veut organiser une réunion rapide.
translations.it: Il mio capo vuole fissare un breve incontro.
translations.ko: 제 상사는 짧은 회의를 잡으려 합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我老板想安排一个简短的会议。
translations.yue: 我老闆想安排一個簡短的會議。
translations.ru: Мой начальник хочет назначить короткую встречу.
translations.pt: Meu chefe quer marcar uma reunião rápida.
translations.he: המנהל שלי רוצה לקבוע פגישה קצרה.
translations.tr: Patronum kısa bir toplantı ayarlamak istiyor.
translations.vi: Sếp tôi muốn सắp xếp một cuộc họp ngắn.
translations.nl: Mijn baas wil een korte vergadering plannen.
translations.uk: Мій начальник хоче домовитися про коротку зустріч.
translations.hu: A főnököm egy rövid megbeszélést szeretne egyeztetni.
translations.hi: मेरे बॉस एक छोटी मीटिंग तय करना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Mój szef chce umówić krótkie spotkanie.
translations.el: Το αφεντικό μου θέλει να κανονίσει μια σύντομη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Sjefen min vil avtale et kort møte.
translations.id: Bos saya ingin mengatur pertemuan singkat.
translations.sv: Min chef vill ordna ett kort möte.
translations.ro: Șeful meu vrea să stabilească o întâlnire scurtă.
translations.cs: Můj šéf chce domluvit krátkou schůzku.
translations.da: Min chef vil arrangere et kort møde.
translations.ja: 上司は短い打ち合わせを入れたがっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Chef' (adnominal use).
Common noun, masculine; grammatical subject in nominative.
Modal auxiliary, finite (3rd person singular present); expresses intention; selects the infinitive 'vereinbaren'.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner for 'Treffen'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Treffen'; accusative neuter singular with strong ending -es.
Common noun, neuter; direct object (accusative) of 'vereinbaren'.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary; non-separable.
